Main Mission (ミッション・メイン, misshon/mein?) can be accessed in the [MISSION] page, which follows your game progress throughout the time.

General]

Missions related to Profile, Story, Friend, User Rank, or any general elements

Items:
  • Profile
  • Story
  • User Rank
  • Friend
